heading: Difficult Dog?
blockquote: To us, there's no such thing as a "difficult" dog.
body:
Do you have a nervous dog? Has your dog bitten a groomer in the past? If you're struggling to find a grooming salon in North Somerset that will accept your dog because of difficult behaviour in the past, then you can stop searching. The Pet Studio has you covered.

At The Pet Studio we specialise in dogs that are scared and nervous of the grooming environment. Even dogs deemed as aggressive or difficult are welcome with us because we take the time to understand the dog, work closely with their owners and ensure that we provide a calm and enjoyable grooming experience.

And remember, with over 20 years' of grooming experience in-house, there really isn't anything that we haven't dealt with before!
